title: Cannot place Guild Construction>Diagrams
details: Cannot place full diagrams. Error: "Diagram contains invalid components for this panel."
notes: CN server receives also this update which is problematic. Many builders use those components in their work. It's critical because days of efforts are lost because of this.

title: Cannot place guild diagrams component
details: Cannot place/copy any exclusive component from Guild Construction > Diagrams in guild base. Error: "This component is not available in the current panel."
notes: Probable root cause:Cannot place Guild Construction>Diagrams

title: Cannot apply some custom diagrams
details: Custom/Saved guild diagrams cannot be applied in certain conditions. Error: "Blueprint contains components that cannot be placed in the Open World."
notes: Probable root cause:Cannot place Guild Construction>Diagrams. Indeed, diagram can contain some components from Guild construction > Diagrams

title: Cannot post edit component from diagrams
details: Unable to use edit: pick up, replace, move any components built from diagram. Error: "Diagram component does not support this action"
notes: Concern any component from any diagram

title: Stone platforms do not cover grass
details: Grass clips through the platform whereas platforms used to cover it before

title: Large component disappear when near them
details: Approaching large build component make them disappear on mobile (e.g. Rainbow Resort Bridge with Pavilion II and Rainbow Resort Gate II).
notes: Does not happen on PC. TODO: verify solo, ps5

title: Theater stage missing shadow figure
details: "Theater Stage" Single Use component has no shadow as of now

title: Guqin table cloth mat disappears when rotate
details: Appearance is different when post rotating
notes: Not tested on other platform and solo

title: Cannot rotate on 2nd axe on mobile & ps5
details: We can rotate now on PC but not on another platform

title: Interactive components missing from guilds
details: All interactive building components are missing from guild base, including all interactable chairs and furniture. They no longer appear but still count toward the component cap.
